title: ASR Outdoor 3L Dry Sack with Roll Top, Small Lightweight Waterproof Storage Bag
description:
Keep essentials protected wherever adventure takes you with ASR Outdoors compact and lightweight 3L dry bag in blue colorway, designed for reliable waterproof storage in any environment. Whether you're kayaking, boating, hiking, camping, traveling and more, this small dry sack acts as a dependable barrier against rain, splashes and moisture, making it an essential piece of outdoor gear for keeping valuables safe and dry.

Engineered as a mini dry bag with space saving design, the collapsible bag is great for storing phones, wallets, keys snacks and other small essentials or accessories, without adding unnecessary bulk to a pack or outdoor gear and equipment. The roll top closure system creates a secure seal, while doubling as a convenient carry handle, that’s easily attachable.

Constructed from durable, water tight 210T material with reinforced double stitched seams, this waterproof gear bag is built to withstand rugged conditions across a wide range of activities, from rafting and kayaking, to fishing, hiking and beach or river outings. The bright, easy-to-spot blue color ensures quick access, while the flexible structure allows for efficient packing and storage.

Whether you're navigating open water or exploring the trail, this compact dry storage bag delivers dependable performance when you need it most, making it a must have item to keep valuables protected from the elements.

Please Note: while this dry bag is waterproof and highly water resistant, it is not intended for full submersion or use as a flotation device
short_description: Constructed from durable, water tight 210T material with reinforced double stitched seams, this waterproof gear bag is built to withstand rugged conditions across a wide range of activities, from rafting and kayaking, to fishing, hiking and beach or river outings.
